me: Folding models for commercial use

For folding commercial reformers:

 商业用途折叠模型

用于折叠商业改革者：

Wooden folding – FR001 is the more stable option for studio use.
木质折叠型——FR001 是工作室使用的更稳定的选择。
Aluminum folding – FR004 is structurally stronger and better suited for higher frequency environments.
铝制折叠型——FR004 在结构上更强，更适合高频环境。

That said, for full-time commercial studios, non-folding models are generally preferred due to long-term structural rigidity.

所以说，对于全职商业工作室来说，非折叠型通常更受欢迎，因为它们具有长期的结构刚性。
me: AR001 vs AR011 – Main Structural Difference

The price difference between AR001 and AR011 comes primarily from:

 AR001 与 AR011 – 主要结构差异

AR001 与 AR011 之间的价格差异主要来自：

Rail structure thickness
轨道结构厚度
Carriage stability under load
承重稳定性
Aluminum grade
铝材等级
Precision machining and finishing
精密加工与抛光
Long-term durability under high-frequency commercial use
长期耐高频商业使用

AR001 is positioned as a cost-efficient aluminum option.

AR011 is engineered with heavier structural reinforcement and tighter tolerances, designed for studios running high class volume.

So it’s not just design similarity — it’s structural specification and manufacturing level.

AR001 定位为高性价比的铝制选项。

AR011 采用更重的结构加固和更严格的公差标准，专为运行高级别业务量的工作室设计。

所以这不仅仅是设计相似——还包括结构规格和制造水平。
me: To clarify the structural difference more specifically:

AR011 includes several upgraded components compared to AR001:

为了更具体地说明结构差异：

与 AR001 相比，AR011 包含多个升级组件：

German-made springs (more consistent resistance and longer lifespan)  
Built-in full rail system (internal track structure for smoother carriage travel and higher rigidity)  
One-click rope adjustment system (faster length adjustment during class transitions)  

AR001 is positioned as a cost-efficient aluminum reformer and performs well for general commercial environments.

AR011 is engineered for higher frequency studio usage where durability, smoothness, and adjustment efficiency become more critical.

The price difference mainly comes from these upgraded structural and component specifications.

For folding commercial reformers:

Wooden folding – FR001 is the more stable option for studio use.

Aluminum folding – FR004 is structurally stronger and better suited for higher frequency environments.

That said, for full-time commercial studios, non-folding models are generally preferred due to long-term structural rigidity.

AR001 vs AR011 – Main Structural Difference

The price difference between AR001 and AR011 comes primarily from:

 AR001 与 AR011 – 主要结构差异

Rail structure thickness

Carriage stability under load
承重稳定性
Aluminum grade
铝材等级
Precision machining and finishing
精密加工与抛光
Long-term durability under high-frequency commercial use
长期耐高频商业使用

AR001 is positioned as a cost-efficient aluminum option.

AR011 is engineered with heavier structural reinforcement and tighter tolerances, designed for studios running high class volume.

So it’s not just design similarity — it’s structural specification and manufacturing level.

AR011 采用更重的结构加固和更严格的公差标准，专为运行高级别业务量的工作室设计。

AR011 includes several upgraded components compared to AR001:

与 AR001 相比，AR011 包含多个升级组件：

German-made springs (more consistent resistance and longer lifespan)  
Built-in full rail system (internal track structure for smoother carriage travel and higher rigidity)  
One-click rope adjustment system (faster length adjustment during class transitions)  

AR001 is positioned as a cost-efficient aluminum reformer and performs well for general commercial environments.

AR011 is engineered for higher frequency studio usage where durability, smoothness, and adjustment efficiency become more critical.

The price difference mainly comes from these upgraded structural and component specifications.
